---
title: "Consciousness"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*.ipynb"
    - "!index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

## Consciousness

Investigations into the nature of subjective experience, contemplative science, and the neuroscience of awareness.

### Topics to explore:

- Predictive processing and active inference
- Altered states of consciousness
- Contemplative neuroscience and meditation
- Neurophenomenology and first-person methods
- EEG markers of consciousness
- Theories of consciousness (IIT, GWT, HOT, etc.)
- Psychedelics and transformative experience
- Death anxiety and existential awareness

---

::: {#listing}
:::
